{{VEFriendly}}
== List as of Jun 21st 2026 ==

{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Page 
! Last edited to application 
! User 
! Global edits
! Edits in last 3 months
! Age of account
! Home Wiki
! Approved
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Ibjaja055]] 
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/Ibjaja055}}}} 
| [[User:Ibjaja055]] 
| 29,779
|
|
|
|
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/EYo237]] 
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/EYo237}}}} 
| [[User:EYo237]] 
| 5,957
|
|
|
|
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Pharouqenr]] 
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/Pharouqenr}}}} 
| [[User:Pharouqenr]] 
| 63,241
|
|
|
|
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Nnamadee]] 
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/Nnamadee}}}} 
| [[User:Nnamadee]] 
| 20,212
|
|
|
|
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/BnHamid]] 
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/BnHamid}}}} 
| [[User:BnHamid]] 
| 79,742
|
|
|
|
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/ᱯᱨᱚᱯᱷᱮᱥᱥᱚᱨ]] 
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/ᱯᱨᱚᱯᱷᱮᱥᱥᱚᱨ}}}} 
| [[User:ᱯᱨᱚᱯᱷᱮᱥᱥᱚᱨ]] 
| 2,955
|
|
|
|
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/sardeeq]] 
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/sardeeq}}}} 
| [[User:Sardeeq]] 
| 30,231
|
|
|
|
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Dolphyb]] 
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/Dolphyb}}}} 
| [[User:Dolphyb]] 
| 2,378,585
|
|
|
|Yes
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Yendifa]] 
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/Yendifa}}}} 
| [[User:Yendifa]] 
| 7,607
|
|
|
|
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Shahidul Hasan Roman]] 
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/Shahidul Hasan Roman}}}} 
| [[User:Shahidul Hasan Roman]] 
| 16,890
|
|
|
|
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Brazal.dang]] 
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/Brazal.dang}}}} 
| [[User:Ballardmaize]] 
| 41,851
|
|
|
|Yes
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Mercyuniverse]] 
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/Mercyuniverse}}}} 
| [[User:Mercyuniverse]] 
| 1,417
|
|
|
|
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Nguini Désiré]] 
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/Nguini Désiré}}}} 
| [[User:Nguini Désiré]] 
| 2,002
|
|
|
|
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Agbalagba]] 
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/Agbalagba}}}} 
| [[User:Agbalagba]] 
| 10,837
|
|
|
|
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Chinemeremprince]] 
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/Chinemeremprince}}}} 
| [[User:Chinemeremprince]]

|
|
|
|
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Ola.mahadi]] 
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/Ola.mahadi}}}} 
| [[User:Ola.mahadi]]

|
|
|
|
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Hamed Gamaoun]] 
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/Hamed Gamaoun}}}} 
| [[User:Hamed Gamaoun]]

|
|
|
|
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Jwale2]] 
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/Jwale2}}}} 
| [[User:Jwale2]] 
| 26,085
|
|
|
|Yes

| [[Hardware donation program/Tmamatha]] 
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/Tmamatha}}}} 
| [[User:Tmamatha]]

|

| [[Hardware donation program/रोहित साव27]]

| [[User:रोहित साव27]]

|
|
|
|Hi

| [[User:Muralikrishna m]]

|

| [[User:Albetudu]]

| [[User:Aminwa 21]]

|
|

|

| [[User:Leeturtle]]

|
|

| [[User:Mbaidoo]]

| [[User:Obangmoy]]

|

|
|

|
|

|
|

| [[User:Dezedien]]

|

|
|

|Yes Ar

|

|

|
|
|

|
|
|

|
|
|

|

|
|
|

| [[User:Tenaciuos Ntaawa]]

|
|
|
|
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Vision L1]] 
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/Vision L1}}}} 
| [[User:Vision L1]] 
| 24,397
|
|
|
|
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/নৰুনা বৰুৱা]] 
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/নৰুনা বৰুৱা}}}} 
| [[User:নৰুনা বৰুৱা]] 
| 15,940
|
|
|
|
|}
